definitions.ANNOTATION_ONLY: Typed policy/bundle attached; no consume candidate; no live product authority.
definitions.CANDIDATE_CONSUMED: Policy + CANDIDATE_ONLY consume exists; live allow_*=false; master Gate NOT proven; not production.
definitions.GATE_PROVEN: Master-file phase Gate satisfied with recorded evidence for the stated scope.
definitions.PILOT: Human-reviewed limited cohort; still not general production_approved.
definitions.PRODUCTION: Explicit human production_approved for a capability matrix row with monitoring/rollback.
